title: FakeSeed
body:
FakeSeed Description FakeSeed is a lightweight yet powerful Minecraft server plugin designed to obfuscate your world's actual seed value. By intercepting the /seed command, this plugin displays either randomly generated seeds or custom-defined values instead of the actual world seed, adding an extra layer of protection and mystery to your server. Key Features 🎲 Customizable Seed Display Random Seed Generation: Display completely random seed values each time the command is used Custom Seed Pool: Define your own list of seed values to be randomly selected from Formatted Messages: Fully customize how the seed information is presented with color codes and formatting 🛡️ Server Protection World Security: Prevent players from recreating your world by hiding the real seed Anti-Cheat Enhancement: Stop players from using seed-based exploits to locate structures or resources Admin Control: Only server operators can reload configuration settings 🧩 User Experience Deception Options: Occasionally show "no seed available" messages for added realism Probability Control: Set the chance of showing "no seed available" vs. a fake seed Seamless Integration: Works exactly like the vanilla /seed command from the player perspective ⚙️ Technical Features Performance Optimized: Minimal impact on server performance Configuration Hot-Reload: Change settings without restarting your server API Version Support: Works with Minecraft 1.20+ servers Permission System: Granular control over who can administer the plugin Use Cases For Server Owners FakeSeed offers valuable protection for unique custom worlds. By preventing players from obtaining the real seed value, you maintain exclusivity of your carefully crafted environments and prevent players from exploring your world in single-player mode with the same generation parameters. For Survival Servers On survival servers, hiding the true seed prevents players from using seed-based tools to locate valuable resources like diamond veins, ancient cities, or other rare structures. This preserves the intended exploration experience and prevents unfair advantages. For Adventure Maps Creators of adventure maps and custom experiences can use FakeSeed to prevent players from "cheating" by looking up structures or features based on the seed value, ensuring that players experience the content as intended. For Roleplay Servers Add to the mystery and immersion of your roleplay server by displaying thematic "seed" values that fit your server's lore instead of meaningless numbers. Why Choose FakeSeed? FakeSeed stands out as the ideal seed protection solution due to its balance of simplicity and comprehensive features. While some alternatives merely block the /seed command entirely (which can seem suspicious to players), FakeSeed provides natural-looking responses that maintain the vanilla feel while adding robust protection. The plugin's minimal resource footprint ensures it won't impact your server's performance, and its extensive configuration options let you tailor the behavior exactly to your server's needs. Whether you're running a small private server or a large public network, FakeSeed provides the perfect blend of security and customization. Keep your world truly unique and maintain the mystery of your server's generation by implementing FakeSeed in your plugin lineup today!
